eligible_applicant_type: Public libraries established pursuant to Chapter 33 or Chapter 54 of Title 40 of the New Jersey Revised Statutes
Libraries established pursuant to N.J.S.A. 15A:1-1 et seq.
project_area: Digital equity and digital navigation services in public libraries
demographic_requirements: Communities with racial and ethnic minorities, limited English proficiency, lower levels of formal education, and low-income households
eligibility_summary: Public libraries in New Jersey that receive public funds pursuant to N.J.S.A.40:54-35 are eligible to apply.
